title: pluchea baccharis
intro: Pluchea baccharis, also known as Baccharis, is a perennial shrub native to the Americas, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Pluchea baccharis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
